verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your love is amazing Steady and unchanging Your love is a mountain Firm beneath my feet

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your love is a mystery How You gently lift me When I am surrounded Your love carries me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your love is surprising I can feel it rising All the joy that's growing Deep inside of me And every time I see you All your goodness shines through And I can feel this God song rising up in me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah Your love makes me sing Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah Your love makes me sing

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your love is surprising I can feel it rising All the joy that's growing Deep inside of me And every time I see you All your goodness shines through And I can feel this God song rising up in me
